feed.title: TEAM141
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Schedule For Interview Preparation
entry.summary: This post is to show a sample of scheduling “Daily Routine and Study Timetable” for cracking DevOps Interview. Daily Routine & Study TimeTable Time Table Study Timetable Daily Routine Daily Routine

entry.title: Docker History
entry.summary: Building an Apache2 Docker container from Docker File Dockerfile FROM ubuntu:18.04 LABEL "Project"="LilFasion" ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive RUN apt update RUN apt install apache2 -y WORKDIR /var/www/html #COPY lilfasion.tar.gz /var/www/html ADD lilfasion.tar.gz /var/www/html CMD ["/usr/sbin/apache2ctl", "-D", "FOREGROUND"] RUN service apache2 restart VOLUME /var/log/apache2 EXPOSE 80 ...

entry.title: Python Scripting
entry.summary: Code block print ("welcome to Python") welcome to Python print("Python indentations") Python indentations print("Python indentations") print("") print("#######") Python indentations ####### #This is comment, single line print("$$$$$$$$$$$$$$") $$$$$$$$$$$$$$ """This is a multi line comment""" print("&&&&&&&&&&") &&&&...

entry.title: Bash Scripting
entry.summary: Code block Today’s Assignment Single BASH Script for Webserver launch in CENTOS and UBUNTU Type-2 #!/bin/bash # Variable Declaration echo webtemplate=https://templatemo.com/tm-zip-files-2020/templatemo_520_highway.zip webpage=templatemo_520_highway # Condition to test whether it is Centos or Ubuntu echo sudo apt --help if [ $? -eq 0 ] then echo "############### UBUNTU MACHINE #####...

entry.title: Enable Google Page Views
entry.summary: This post is to enable Page Views on the Chirpy theme based blog that you just built. This requires technical knowledge and it’s recommended to keep the google_analytics.pv.* empty unless you have a good reason. If your website has low traffic, the page views count would discourage you to write more blogs. With that said, let’s start with the setup. Set up Google Analytics Create GA account a...
